side_effects.description: While on both SSRI and Retatrutide, took MDMA and experienced overheating (possible serotonin syndrome symptoms), requiring Advil, Tylenol, hydration, and cold showers. Lost euphoric effects of MDMA; only retained energy effect.

protocol_notes: User is on an SSRI in addition to Retatrutide ('ret'). MDMA experience resulted in possible serotonin syndrome symptoms. No dose or protocol details for Retatrutide provided.
